reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: The function name was misleading and did not accurately reflect its purpose. The rename to sunrpc_cache_upcall_warn() is a good correction.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch renames the function sunrpc_cache_pipe_upcall_timeout() to sunrpc_cache_upcall_warn(), as it no longer represents a timeout but instead warns if there are no listeners.
